evidence.description: As IRGC Missile Commander, Moghaddam reported through the IRGC chain of command to Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei, who attended his funeral personally — an exceptional gesture reflecting Moghaddam's direct strategic value to the Supreme Leader.

editorial_notes: The IRGC's Commander-in-Chief reports directly to the Supreme Leader. Khamenei's attendance at the funeral confirmed the strategic significance of this relationship.
